posts.author: makis34693 (makis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
Recently I joined Snowflake training in chennai and I’m running into an issue where an automation that normally updates an item based on a status change suddenly throws a “Something went wrong” error. It was working fine until yesterday and now it’s failing without any clear reason.

I’ve double-checked the automation recipe and nothing has changed on my end. Is there a known issue going on, or is there a better way to debug what’s causing this?

Any help would be appreciated!
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: My first recommendation is always to delete and recreate the automation. If it still fails, can you provide a screenshot of the error you’re getting?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! Following up on this to check in–did you pinpoint the issue for your automation? Did you end up following Desiree’s suggested troubleshooting step? Let us know if you’d still like some help looking into this!
